brief_summary: Price/time chart in lapis-blue (plum-blue, oklch 0.55 0.13 270). MSRP and 2× MSRP horizontal guides. R1 close marker at MSRP, dashed aftermarket curve climbing past 2× MSRP, then a vertical arrow dropping back to MSRP at R2 close (2026-05-10). Faint outline marker at Q4 2026 fulfillment with the compression question. Caption: 'second-and-likely-last chance at MSRP'.
data_sources: gmk-cyl-ishtar-r2-group-buy.mdx § 'What an R2 actually does' — 'doubleshot ABS tooling is expensive ... buyers who missed the first round end up paying secondary-market premiums that have, on reference sets in the corpus, run double or higher relative to MSRP. The R2 is the editorial event because it interrupts that curve.'
gmk-cyl-ishtar-r2-group-buy.mdx § 'What we're watching' — 'whether the aftermarket premium on the original Ishtar collapses after R2 fulfillment lands in Q4 2026'
